title: Alkebuleum Launches Liberia's First Blockchain Anti-Corruption Program
excerpt: Launched in Monrovia, equipping youth and institutions with tools designed to make corruption structurally impossible. Scaling to all 15 counties through NGO, university, and government partnerships.

title: AmVault SDK v0.1.9 Released to npm
excerpt: Now supports EIP-1193 compatibility, batch transactions, and standalone message signing — enabling full integration with ethers.js and wagmi.

title: AIChain Enters Final Security Audit Ahead of Mainnet
excerpt: AIChain's AIR tokenomics and on-chain reputation system with negative balance mechanics enters final audit phase before mainnet launch.
